Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course's core theme, 'Circular Economy and Sustainability,' is fundamental to this SDG, directly addressing resource use, waste reduction, and sustainable patterns (Targets 12.2, 12.5).

Climate Action.reason: The course is explicitly framed around 'climate change,' 'emission of carbon dioxide,' and 'Sustainability Policy,' making this SDG central (Targets 13.2, 13.3).

Life on Land.reason: Circular economy principles, by reducing resource extraction and waste, indirectly support the sustainable use of terrestrial ecosystems (Target 15.1).
